# Checking the Assumptions {#checking-assumptions}

```{r checking-assumptions-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/checking-assumptions-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/checking-assumptions/"
)
```

```{r child-checking-assumptions, child="../lecture-content/05-checking-assumptions.Rmd"}
```
